# Midnight Node

> Implementation of the Midnight blockchain node, providing consensus, transaction processing, and privacy-preserving smart contract execution. The node enables participants to maintain both public blockchain state and private user state through zero-knowledge proofs. Built on Substrate as a Cardano Partner Chain.

## Overview

- [README.md](README.md): Project overview, architecture diagram, quick start, and development workflow
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution guidelines, code standards, and pull request process
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): Apache 2.0 license
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community code of conduct
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): Security policy and vulnerability reporting
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history and release notes

## Documentation

- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): Documentation index and resources

- [docs/development-workflow.md](docs/development-workflow.md): Development environment setup, Cargo vs Earthly best practices, debugging tips
- [docs/rust-setup.md](docs/rust-setup.md): Rust toolchain installation and configuration
- [docs/chain_specs.md](docs/chain_specs.md): Chain specification documentation for different networks
- [docs/weights.md](docs/weights.md): Runtime weights and benchmarking documentation
- [docs/fork-testing.md](docs/fork-testing.md): Testing against forked network state
- [docs/actionlint-guide.md](docs/actionlint-guide.md): GitHub Actions workflow validation

## Architecture Decisions

Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) document significant design decisions:

- [docs/decisions/0001-ariadne-selection-emergency-override.md](docs/decisions/0001-ariadne-selection-emergency-override.md): Emergency override mechanism for authority selection
- [docs/decisions/0002-configuration-system.md](docs/decisions/0002-configuration-system.md): Node configuration system design
- [docs/decisions/0003-arm64-ci-builds.md](docs/decisions/0003-arm64-ci-builds.md): ARM64 architecture support in CI

## Design Proposals

- [docs/proposals/0001-configuration-overhaul.md](docs/proposals/0001-configuration-overhaul.md): Proposed configuration system improvements

## Runtime Pallets

Custom Substrate pallets implementing core blockchain functionality:

- [pallets/README.md](pallets/README.md): Pallets index and overview
- [pallets/midnight/README.md](pallets/midnight/README.md): Core pallet managing ledger state, transaction execution, and zero-knowledge proof verification
- [pallets/midnight-system/README.md](pallets/midnight-system/README.md): System transaction management with root privileges
- [pallets/federated-authority/README.md](pallets/federated-authority/README.md): Multi-collective governance requiring consensus from multiple authority bodies
- [pallets/federated-authority-observation/README.md](pallets/federated-authority-observation/README.md): Governance synchronization with Cardano mainchain
- [pallets/system-parameters/README.md](pallets/system-parameters/README.md): On-chain governance parameters (Terms and Conditions, D-Parameter)
- [pallets/cnight-observation/README.md](pallets/cnight-observation/README.md): Native token (cNIGHT) bridge integration with Cardano
- [pallets/version/README.md](pallets/version/README.md): Runtime version tracking in block digests

## Node Components

- [node/README.md](node/README.md): Midnight node binary with RPC server, consensus (AURA/GRANDPA/BEEFY), P2P networking, and keystore
- [runtime/README.md](runtime/README.md): Substrate runtime composing all pallets into the blockchain logic
- [primitives/README.md](primitives/README.md): Shared types and traits used across the codebase
- [ledger/README.md](ledger/README.md): Privacy-preserving ledger implementation with zero-knowledge proof support
- [relay/README.md](relay/README.md): Cross-chain relay for Cardano bridge operations

## Utilities

- [util/README.md](util/README.md): Utilities index and overview
- [util/toolkit/README.md](util/toolkit/README.md): CLI tool for transaction generation, wallet management, contract deployment, and testing
- [util/toolkit-js/README.md](util/toolkit-js/README.md): JavaScript CLI for Compact contract execution
- [local-environment/README.md](local-environment/README.md): Tools for launching local development networks and performing state changes

## Resources and Configuration

- [res/README.md](res/README.md): Chain specifications, genesis configurations, and network-specific resources
- [static/contracts](static/contracts): Compiled contract artifacts (provers, verifiers)
- [scripts/README.md](scripts/README.md): Development and operational scripts
- [tests/README.md](tests/README.md): End-to-end and integration test suites

## External Resources

- [Midnight Developer Documentation](https://docs.midnight.network/): Official developer documentation
- [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/midnightnetwork): Community support and discussions
- [Telegram](https://t.me/Midnight_Network_Official): Official Telegram channel
- [X/Twitter](https://x.com/MidnightNtwrk): Official announcements and updates
